name: hero-motion
description: Instagram promotional and marketing video templates built with Remotion

scripts.render:story: npx remotion render src/index.ts InstagramStory out/story.mp4
scripts.render:reel: npx remotion render src/index.ts InstagramReel out/reel.mp4
scripts.render:post: npx remotion render src/index.ts InstagramPost out/post.mp4
scripts.render:promo: npx remotion render src/index.ts PromoVideo out/promo.mp4
scripts.render:all: npm run render:story && npm run render:reel && npm run render:post && npm run render:promo

author: Lentio Sechou
